title: Umbra Poor Ores Mekanism Addon
description: Adds Mekanism generators to Umbra Poor Ores
body:
Mekanism addon for Umbra Poor Ores:

Adds Mekanism generator Tier 1 and 2
- Tier 1 Generates Poor tin, lead and osmium
- Tier 2 Generates Poor tin, lead, osmium, uranium, fluorite and salt

Also adds recipes for mekanism tin, lead, osmium, uranium and fluorite ores and salt block made from Poor Ore materials.

Requires [Umbra Poor Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/umbra-poor-ores) and [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
